_comment: Encore CLI deploy workflow fixture. Updated with verified outputs from @davirain's real Encore account.

workflow.prerequisite: App must be registered on Encore Cloud

expected.failure_not_logged_in: error: not logged in. Run 'encore auth login' first.

workflow.expected_output: [PENDING] Needs stdout/stderr capture from real deploy

workflow.verified: encore namespace list -o json returns namespace objects with 'id' field

workflow.fallback_1: encore namespace list -o json → DOES NOT contain service_url
workflow.fallback_2: [INVESTIGATE] Check encore app info / encore config / Cloud Dashboard API

_comments: The app is not currently linked to the encore.dev platform.
Use "encore app link" to link it.

observed_encore_readme_deployment_sectio:
Deploy your application to a staging environment in Encore's free development cloud:
  git add -A .
  git commit -m 'Commit message'
  git push encore
Then head over to https://app.encore.dev to monitor your deployment and find your production URL.
